title: ukia's copper tools
description:
(oxidizing and ingot-like copper tools)
change copper tools to fit better with the ingot and armor and oxidize.
WITH OXIDIZATION!
(visual via durability / decay)
body:
change the copper tools to be the color palette of the ingot because the vanilla ones look wierd (espcially the sword) and makes tools Oxidize!!!
Makes the tools more in line with the ingot and the armor.
There is a version with the vanilla style of hoes and a version with my ukia's hoes that are cozy and much better.
Most Gas Fire Flames Copper ever.
oxidization is yippers!

Durability threshholds are (0.0, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7) so they spend more time as fully non-oxidized and fully oxidized. If you want to change this, they are in the JSONS in the items folder.

No mods required.

![with pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9e059ca8ec1052c5ed82cabb83be4d75f6f752f.png)
vs.
